name: S2_count_ones
description: Standalone program: returns 255 if no args; else returns (first byte of argv[1]) + (count of '1' digits in all args) modulo 256.
io_hint: Derive the result from a general mapping of the first provided token (e.g., transform its first byte/feature), then combine it with an aggregation over all inputs. With only one token, the aggregation should reduce to its neutral element, yielding the base mapping—no special-casing literal values.
